ogTitle: Narrawong vs Narre Warren: Climate Safety

heading: Narrawong vs Narre Warren — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narrawong, Victoria and Narre Warren, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narre Warren has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Narrawong (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narrawong or Narre Warren safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narrawong has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Narre Warren scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narrawong scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Narre Warren scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narrawong or Narre Warren?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narre Warren has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
